## Type of change

- [ ] New error code

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally with zero errors
- [ ] New localization key added to `localization/tokens/en.json`
- [ ] `journey-refs.json` updated if this code appears in an existing journey
- [ ] Screens include both `desktop.json` and `mobile.json`
- [ ] PR title follows: `feat(registry): add NEG-XXX-category-subcode`
